---
title: "Figure_1C_Azimuth_Finest_UMAP"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```
```{r}
# Path to integrated object used for analysis
lungQuery <- readRDS("path_to_object/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
```
```{r azimuth_umap, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
dir.create("Plots_UMAP", showWarnings = FALSE)

p_fine <- DimPlot(
  lungQuery,
  group.by = "predicted.ann_finest_level",
  label = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.01,
  label.size = 5,
  repel = TRUE,
  raster = FALSE
) + ggtitle("Azimuth Annotation - Finest Level")

ggsave(
  filename = "Plots_UMAP/UMAP_Azimuth_Finest_Level.png",
  plot = p_fine,
  width = 16,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 300,
  limitsize = FALSE
)

knitr::include_graphics("Plots_UMAP/UMAP_Azimuth_Finest_Level.png")
